top_signals.title: Oil Drops to Four-Month Low as Talks Conclude in Doha
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell more than 1% to a four-month low on Thursday as concerns over supply disruptions eased after mediator Qatar said Iran and the U.S. made progress in talks over ending the four-month war that shut the key shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.Brent futures were $1.03…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
top_signals.summary: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump’s Washington.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

BHP seeks to restart Cerro Colorado mine with $1.5B investment
top_signals.summary: The copper mine has been closed since late 2023 after it was denied its water permit.

top_signals.summary: New results were highlighted by an intercept of 3.51 g/t gold over 21 metres from 245 metres down.

top_signals.title: Commission greenlights Portugal's ninth payment request for €2.32 billion under NextGenerationEU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 02 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission positively assessed Portugal's ninth payment request for €2.32 billion under the Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF), the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.
